courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Live Ops Portfolio Game
genericDescription: Combine multiplayer/social design with operations thinking; present a deployable plan; test with a small audience; prepare for at least one platform constraint such as mobile, web, classroom, kiosk, or PC storefront.
specificDescription: Build a polished game that includes social, networked, asynchronous, mobile/touch, leaderboard, or live-operations elements. Submit a one-month live plan with update cadence, community metrics, telemetry events, moderation needs, and risk mitigations.
gradingRubric: 30 pts final game quality; 20 pts operations plan; 20 pts social/system/platform design; 15 pts metrics and risk plan; 15 pts presentation.
